title: Modern Controlling Core
description: This mod ONLY includes the Core module of Modern Controlling.
body:
# Modern Controlling Core This mod ONLY includes the Core module of [Modern Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-controlling).
The foundation of other [Modern Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-controlling) modules.
Add a new control settings screen, similar to Mojang did in 21w37a. ## Note: - You ***CAN*** use this mod in your modpack.
